name: Chainlink
description: List CCIP-supported blockchain networks and track the status and details of a cross-chain message.

auth.hint: The selected CCIP query endpoints are public and require no API key.

tools.name: list_chains
tools.description: List blockchain networks supported by the CCIP API.

tools.name: get_message
tools.description: Retrieve the current status and details of a CCIP cross-chain message.

params.name: messageId
params.description: CCIP message ID obtained from a ccipSend transaction log or the message search endpoint.
